author: Catherine Salgado
title: CCP Bewails Gazan Jihadis While Committing Genocide at Home – PJ Media
text: The mass-murdering Chinese Communist Party (CCP) is once again falsely accusing the U.S. and Israel of murderous policies even while it is committing genocide of ethnic and religious minorities in China. The CCP is persecuting Christians and wiping out Muslim minorities, the devastating latest phase of its long history of genocide. The CCP is responsible for more deaths than any other government or entity in world history, at 500 million and counting. Yet it has the chutzpah to lecture the U.S. on supposedly helping Israel create a “humanitarian disaster” in Gaza. A Uyghur-American politician, Salih Hudayar, just called attention again to the ongoing CCP genocide of Uyghurs. The problem of the CCP using Uyghur forced labor is so egregious that even the CCP - pandering Biden administration has just sanctioned 29 more companies with ties to the forced labor. Not only that, but International Christian Concern rated China one of the world’s worst persecutors of Christians in 2023. The CCP also censors , spies on , arrests , and tyrannizes its citizens. The Biden-Harris administration is corrupt and authoritarian, but it pales in comparison to the scope of the CCP’s crimes. CCP state propaganda outlet Global Times repeated Hamas-issued statistics and lies on Nov. 21 while bashing the U.S. for actually taking the correct action for once and vetoing a UN resolution demanding Israel engage in a cease-fire, which Israel cannot do as long as Hamas and Hezbollah continue to hold Israelis hostage and attack Israeli civilians on a constant basis: This US action once again raises the question: How many more innocent lives in Gaza must be lost to awaken Washington's conscience? Now, nearly 44,000 people have been killed in Gaza, and the US still does not hesitate to use its veto. Nearly all of Gaza's 2.4 million residents have been displaced by the war, creating an unmeasurable humanitarian crisis... The US' repeated vetoes are not only the greatest obstacle to achieving a cease-fire but also the root cause of the dysfunction within the UN Security Council… In the face of death, poverty, and a profound humanitarian crisis in Gaza, the US continues to turn a blind eye to the lives of these people. The Biden-Harris administration has continually funded Hamas-controlled, jihad-loving Gazans, while persistently undermining Israel. The neo-Nazi UN, meanwhile, actively employs and assists Hamas terrorists, and demands that Israel surrender land to the jihadis. Both the Biden administration and the UN are guilty of Israeli blood, but the CCP is even more so. 🛑 We will never forget the Oct. 7 massacre! — David Saranga (@DavidSaranga) In the ICC’s 1900-word statement on arrest warrants against Israeli leaders, not a single word is devoted to October 7 massacre, Israeli victims, hostages, kibbutzim, or Hamas tunnels. Not one mention of how this war began. Hamas is…[pic.twitter.com/5d6yqs7kRl][November 22, 2024] Recommended: Amsterdam Mayor Defends Muslims After Anti-Jewish ‘Pogrom’ As I noted above, the CCP has absolutely no moral credibility. But neither do the Hamas-loving Gazans, who want to commit genocide against Israelis. To the extent that both Hamas and the CCP aim to commit ethnic and religious genocide, it is understandable that they should be allies; but their self-righteous lectures are so hypocritical as to be beyond laughable. The blood of their victims cries out from the earth, and may God punish them for it.
